    33→/**
    34→ * FFmpeg 分段转录服务 - 使用 FFmpeg Kit 处理大视频文件
    35→ *
    36→ * 增强功能：
    37→ * - 支持取消：检查协程状态，随时响应取消请求
    38→ * - 智能分段：基于静音检测和文件大小的自适应分段
    39→ * - 重试机制：每个段失败后自动重试
    40→ * - 超时控制：防止段处理卡死
    41→ * - 剩余时间估算：实时显示预计完成时间
    42→ * - 内存优化：流式处理大文件，不一次性加载
    43→ *
    44→ * 参考 GitHub 项目：
    45→ * - WritingMinds/ffmpeg-kit: Android FFmpeg 支持
    46→ * - gvk7/Whisper-Ffmpeg-Multi-Segment: 多段 Whisper 转录
    47→ * - wendy7756/AI-Video-Transcriber: 20分钟分段策略
    48→ */
    49→@Singleton
    50→class FFmpegSegmentedTranscriptionService @Inject constructor(
    51→    @ApplicationContext private val context: Context,
    52→    private val whisperService: WhisperService
    53→) {
    54→    companion object {
    55→        private const val TAG = "FFmpegSegmentTrans"
    56→        // Groq API 文件大小限制（调整为安全值）
    57→        private const val MAX_API_FILE_SIZE = 25 * 1024 * 1024L // 25MB（Groq 实际限制）
    58→        // 音频段目标大小（留出安全余量）
    59→        private const val TARGET_SEGMENT_SIZE = 20 * 1024 * 1024L // 20MB
    60→        // 分段转录的时长阈值（秒）- 超过此时长使用分段转录
    61→        private const val SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD = 180.0 // 3分钟（降低阈值）
    62→        // 最小分段时长（秒）- 避免分段太小
    63→        private const val MIN_SEGMENT_DURATION = 60L // 1分钟
    64→        // 分段时长（秒）- 根据码率动态调整
    65→        private const val SEGMENT_DURATION = 180L // 3分钟
    66→        // 段间重叠时间（秒）- 增加重叠确保连续性
    67→        private const val OVERLAP_DURATION = 3L
    68→        // 临时文件目录
    69→        private const val TEMP_DIR = "transcription_temp"
    70→        // 最大重试次数
    71→        private const val MAX_RETRIES = 3
    72→        // 重试延迟（毫秒）- 指数退避
    73→        private const val RETRY_DELAY_BASE_MS = 1000L
    74→        // 段提取超时（秒）
    75→        private const val EXTRACTION_TIMEOUT_SEC = 300L  // 5分钟超时
    76→        // 段转录超时（秒）- 根据段长度动态计算
    77→        private const val TRANSCRIPTION_TIMEOUT_SEC_PER_MIN = 120L // 每分钟音频最多2分钟
    78→        // 总转录超时（秒）- 防止卡死
    79→        private const val TOTAL_TRANSCRIPTION_TIMEOUT_SEC = 3600L // 60分钟超时
    80→        // 并行处理数量 - 根据设备性能动态调整（2个并行转录）
    81→        private const val PARALLEL_SEGMENTS = 2
    82→        // API请求间隔（毫秒）- 避免请求过快被限流
    83→        private const val API_REQUEST_INTERVAL_MS = 800L
    84→        // 进度更新频率（段数）
    85→        private const val PROGRESS_UPDATE_INTERVAL = 1
    86→    }
    87→
    88→    /**
    89→     * 分段转录进度数据 - 增强版
    90→     */
    91→    data class SegmentProgress(
    92→        val currentSegment: Int,
    93→        val totalSegments: Int,
    94→        val percent: Int,
    95→        val message: String,
    96→        val remainingSeconds: Long = 0,
    97→        val estimatedCompletionTime: Long = 0,
    98→        // 新增：详细的分段状态
    99→        val segmentStates: Map<Int, SegmentState> = emptyMap()
   100→    )
   101→
   102→    /**
   103→     * 分段状态
   104→     */
   105→    data class SegmentState(
   106→        val index: Int,
   107→        val status: SegmentStatus,
   108→        val message: String = ""
   109→    )
   110→
   111→    enum class SegmentStatus {
   112→        PENDING,       // 等待处理
   113→        EXTRACTING,    // 提取音频中
   114→        EXTRACTED,     // 音频提取完成
   115→        TRANSCRIBING,  // 转录中
   116→        COMPLETED,     // 完成
   117→        FAILED,        // 失败
   118→        CANCELLED       // 已取消
   119→    }
   120→
   121→    /**
   122→     * 分段转录视频
   123→     * @param videoFile 视频文件
   124→     * @param config AI配置
   125→     * @param lang 视频语言代码（如 "en", "ru", "ja" 等），null 表示自动检测
   126→     * @param onProgress 进度回调 (当前段, 总段数, 百分比, 消息, 剩余秒数)
   127→     */
   128→    suspend fun transcribeWithSegments(
   129→        videoFile: File,
   130→        config: AIConfig,
   131→        lang: String? = null,
   132→        onProgress: (Int, Int, Int, String, Long) -> Unit = { _, _, _, _, _ -> }
   133→    ): WhisperResult? = withTimeout(TOTAL_TRANSCRIPTION_TIMEOUT_SEC * 1000L) {
   134→        try {
   135→            val fileSize = videoFile.length()
   136→            val fileSizeMB = String.format("%.2f", fileSize / 1024.0 / 1024.0)
   137→
   138→            Log.d(TAG, "Starting segmented transcription: ${videoFile.name}, $fileSizeMB MB")
   139→            onProgress(0, 1, 5, "获取视频信息...", 0)
   140→
   141→            // 获取视频时长和详细信息
   142→            val mediaInfo = getMediaInformation(videoFile)
   143→
   144→            // 尝试解析时长，兼容多种格式
   145→            val duration = try {
   146→                val durationStr = mediaInfo?.getDuration()
   147→                when {
   148→                    durationStr == null -> null
   149→                    durationStr.matches(Regex("\\d+")) -> durationStr.toLongOrNull()?.div(1000.0)
   150→                    durationStr.matches(Regex("\\d+\\.\\d+")) -> durationStr.toDoubleOrNull()
   151→                    else -> {
   152→                        Log.e(TAG, "Invalid duration format: $durationStr")
   153→                        null
   154→                    }
   155→                }
   156→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   157→                Log.e(TAG, "Error parsing duration: $mediaInfo", e)
   158→                null
   159→            }
   160→
   161→            if (duration == null) {
   162→                Log.e(TAG, "Failed to get video duration")
   163→                return@withContext WhisperResult(
   164→                    success = false,
   165→                    error = "无法读取视频时长，请确保视频文件有效。\n\nFFmpeg 错误: ${mediaInfo?.getAllProperties()}"
   166→                )
   167→            }
   168→
   169→            val durationMinutes = String.format("%.1f", duration / 60.0)
   170→            Log.d(TAG, "Video duration: $durationMinutes minutes ($duration seconds), file size: $fileSizeMB MB")
   171→
   172→            // 判断处理策略 - 基于时长而不是文件大小
   173→            return@withContext when {
   174→                duration <= SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD && fileSize <= MAX_API_FILE_SIZE -> {
   175→                    // 时长较短且文件在API限制内，先压缩音频再转录
   176→                    Log.d(TAG, "Direct transcription with compression (duration: ${duration.toInt()}s, size: ${fileSizeMB}MB)")
   177→                    onProgress(1, 1, 10, "压缩音频...", 0)
   178→
   179→                    // 先压缩音频
   180→                    val compressedFile = compressAudioForTranscription(videoFile)
   181→                    if (compressedFile == null) {
   182→                        Log.e(TAG, "Failed to compress audio, trying original file")
   183→                        onProgress(1, 1, 20, "直接转录中...", 0)
   184→                        whisperService.transcribeGroq(videoFile, config, lang)
   185→                    } else {
   186→                        Log.d(TAG, "Audio compressed: ${compressedFile.length()} bytes")
   187→                        onProgress(1, 1, 30, "转录中...", 0)
   188→                        val result = whisperService.transcribeGroq(compressedFile, config, lang)
   189→                        // 删除临时压缩文件
   190→                        compressedFile.delete()
   191→                        result
   192→                    }
   193→                }
   194→                else -> {
   195→                    // 时长较长或文件过大，需要分段处理
   196→                    val reason = if (duration > SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD) {
   197→                        "video duration exceeds ${SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD.toInt()/60} minutes"
   198→                    } else {
   199→                        "file size exceeds ${MAX_API_FILE_SIZE/1024/1024}MB"
   200→                    }
   201→                    Log.d(TAG, "Segmented transcription: $reason")
   202→                    transcribeSegmentedInternal(videoFile, config, duration, lang, onProgress)
   203→                }
   204→            }
   205→
   206→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   207→            Log.e(TAG, "Transcription error", e)
   208→            Log.e(TAG, "Error stack trace: ${e.stackTraceToString()}")
   209→            WhisperResult(
   210→                success = false,
   211→                error = "❌ 转录失败\n\n错误: ${e.message}\n\n详细日志已输出到 logcat"
   212→            )
   213→        }
   214→    }
   215→
   216→    /**
   217→     * 内部分段转录实现 - 增强版（支持取消、详细进度跟踪）
   218→     */
   219→    private suspend fun transcribeSegmentedInternal(
   220→        videoFile: File,
   221→        config: AIConfig,
   222→        duration: Double,
   223→        lang: String?,
   224→        onProgress: (Int, Int, Int, String, Long) -> Unit
   225→    ): WhisperResult? = coroutineScope {
   226→        Log.d(TAG, "Starting internal segmented transcription, duration: ${duration}s")
   227→        // 检查取消
   228→        ensureActive()
   229→
   230→        // 计算分段数量，传入文件大小以优化分段策略
   231→        val segments = calculateSegments(duration, videoFile.length())
   232→        val totalSegments = segments.size
   233→
   234→        Log.d(TAG, "Will process in $totalSegments segments (parallel: $PARALLEL_SEGMENTS)")
   235→        onProgress(0, totalSegments, 10, "准备处理 $totalSegments 个分段...", 0)
   236→
   237→        // 分段状态跟踪
   238→        val segmentStates = mutableMapOf<Int, SegmentState>()
   239→        segments.forEachIndexed { index, _ ->
   240→            segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.PENDING)
   241→        }
   242→
   243→        // 创建临时目录
   244→        val tempDir = File(context.cacheDir, "$TEMP_DIR${System.currentTimeMillis()}")
   245→        tempDir.mkdirs()
   246→
   247→        // 时间跟踪
   248→        val startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   249→        val segmentTimes = mutableMapOf<Int, Long>()
   250→
   251→        return@coroutineScope try {
   252→            val allWords = mutableListOf<WordTimestamp>()
   253→            var failedSegments = 0
   254→            val successSegments = mutableListOf<Int>()
   255→
   256→            // 第一步：提取所有音频段（串行，因为IO密集）
   257→            onProgress(0, totalSegments, 15, "提取音频段...", 0)
   258→            val segmentFiles = mutableListOf<File?>()
   259→            segments.forEachIndexed { index, segment ->
   260→                // 检查取消
   261→                ensureActive()
   262→
   263→                val segmentFile = File(tempDir, "segment_${index}.m4a")
   264→
   265→                // 更新状态
   266→                segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.EXTRACTING, "提取音频中...")
   267→                updateProgressWithStates(0, totalSegments, 15 + (index * 20 / totalSegments),
   268→                    "提取音频 ${index + 1}/$totalSegments...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   269→
   270→                val extractSuccess = withTimeout(EXTRACTION_TIMEOUT_SEC * 1000L) {
   271→                    extractAudioSegmentWithRetry(videoFile, segmentFile, segment.startTime, segment.duration, index)
   272→                }
   273→
   274→                // 检查取消（在超时后）
   275→                ensureActive()
   276→
   277→                if (extractSuccess && segmentFile.exists()) {
   278→                    segmentFiles.add(segmentFile)
   279→                    segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.EXTRACTED, "音频已提取")
   280→                    Log.d(TAG, "Segment $index extracted successfully")
   281→                } else {
   282→                    Log.e(TAG, "Failed to extract segment $index")
   283→                    segmentFiles.add(null)
   284→                    segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.FAILED, "音频提取失败")
   285→                    failedSegments++
   286→                }
   287→
   288→                // 更新状态
   289→                updateProgressWithStates(index + 1, totalSegments, 15 + ((index + 1) * 20 / totalSegments),
   290→                    "提取完成 ${index + 1}/$totalSegments", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   291→            }
   292→
   293→            // 检查取消（提取完成后）
   294→            ensureActive()
   295→
   296→            // 第二步：并行转录音频段
   297→            updateProgressWithStates(0, totalSegments, 40, "开始转录...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   298→
   299→            val completedIndices = mutableListOf<Int>()
   300→            val transcriptionMutex = Mutex()
   301→            // 使用 semaphore 控制并发数
   302→            val semaphore = Semaphore(PARALLEL_SEGMENTS)
   303→
   304→            // 语言检测：如果用户未指定语言，先转录第一段检测语言，再传给后续分段
   305→            var effectiveLang = lang
   306→            if (effectiveLang == null && segments.isNotEmpty() && segmentFiles[0] != null) {
   307→                val firstSegment = segments[0]
   308→                val firstFile = segmentFiles[0]!!
   309→                segmentStates[0] = SegmentState(0, SegmentStatus.TRANSCRIBING, "检测语言中...")
   310→                updateProgressWithStates(0, totalSegments, 40, "检测语言中...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   311→
   312→                val firstTimeout = (firstSegment.duration / 60.0 * TRANSCRIPTION_TIMEOUT_SEC_PER_MIN * 1000).toLong()
   313→                val firstResult = try {
   314→                    withTimeout(firstTimeout) {
   315→                        transcribeSegmentWithRetry(firstFile, config, 0, firstSegment.duration, null)
   316→                    }
   317→                } catch (e: Exception) {
   318→                    Log.e(TAG, "First segment transcription failed for language detection", e)
   319→                    null
   320→                }
   321→
   322→                if (firstResult?.success == true && firstResult.detectedLang.isNotBlank()) {
   323→                    // 将语言名称转换为代码（如 "English" -> "en"）
   324→                    effectiveLang = LANG_NAME_TO_CODE[firstResult.detectedLang.lowercase()]
   325→                        ?: firstResult.detectedLang.lowercase().take(2)
   326→                    Log.d(TAG, "Detected language from first segment: ${firstResult.detectedLang} -> $effectiveLang")
   327→
   328→                    // 处理第一段结果
   329→                    val adjustedWords = firstResult.words.map { wt ->
   330→                        wt.copy(s = wt.s + firstSegment.startTime, e = wt.e + firstSegment.startTime)
   331→                    }
   332→                    allWords.addAll(adjustedWords)
   333→                    completedIndices.add(0)
   334→                    successSegments.add(0)
   335→                    firstFile.delete()
   336→
   337→                    val transcriptionTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime
   338→                    segmentTimes[0] = transcriptionTime
   339→                    segmentStates[0] = SegmentState(0, SegmentStatus.COMPLETED, "已完成 (${firstResult.words.size} 词, 语言: $effectiveLang)")
   340→                    updateProgressWithStates(1, totalSegments, 40 + (50 / totalSegments),
   341→                        "检测到语言: $effectiveLang, 转录中...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   342→                } else {
   343→                    Log.w(TAG, "Could not detect language from first segment, proceeding with auto-detect")
   344→                }
   345→            }
   346→
   347→            // 确定需要转录的分段（跳过已处理的第一段）
   348→            val remainingIndices = segments.indices.filter { !completedIndices.contains(it) }
   349→
   350→            // 检查取消（第一段处理完成后）
   351→            ensureActive()
   352→
   353→            // 使用 coroutineScope 来并行处理剩余分段
   354→            val results = coroutineScope {
   355→                val transcriptionJobs = remainingIndices.map { index ->
   356→                    val segment = segments[index]
   357→                    async(Dispatchers.IO) {
   358→                        // 使用 semaphore 限制并发数
   359→                        semaphore.withPermit {
   360→                            // 检查取消
   361→                            ensureActive()
   362→
   363→                            if (segmentFiles[index] == null) {
   364→                                Log.e(TAG, "Skipping segment $index (file not extracted)")
   365→                                return@async null
   366→                            }
   367→
   368→                            val segmentFile = segmentFiles[index]!!
   369→                            val segmentStartTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   370→
   371→                            // 更新状态为转录中
   372→                            segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.TRANSCRIBING, "转录中...")
   373→                            updateProgressWithStates(completedIndices.size, totalSegments, 40,
   374→                                "段 ${index + 1} 转录中...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   375→
   376→                            // 计算本段转录超时时间
   377→                            val transcriptionTimeout = (segment.duration / 60.0 * TRANSCRIPTION_TIMEOUT_SEC_PER_MIN * 1000).toLong()
   378→
   379→                            // 转录该段（使用检测到的语言或用户指定的语言）
   380→                            val result = withTimeout(transcriptionTimeout) {
   381→                                transcribeSegmentWithRetry(segmentFile, config, index, segment.duration, effectiveLang)
   382→                            }
   383→
   384→                            // 检查取消
   385→                            ensureActive()
   386→
   387→                            val transcriptionTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - segmentStartTime
   388→                            segmentTimes[index] = transcriptionTime
   389→
   390→                            if (result?.success == true) {
   391→                                // 调整时间戳
   392→                                val adjustedWords = result.words.map { wt ->
   393→                                    wt.copy(s = wt.s + segment.startTime, e = wt.e + segment.startTime)
   394→                                }
   395→
   396→                                // 线程安全地添加结果
   397→                                transcriptionMutex.withLock {
   398→                                    // 去除重叠部分
   399→                                    if (index > 0) {
   400→                                        val overlapThreshold = segment.startTime - OVERLAP_DURATION.toDouble()
   401→                                        val filteredWords = adjustedWords.filter { it.s >= overlapThreshold }
   402→                                        allWords.addAll(filteredWords)
   403→                                    } else {
   404→                                        allWords.addAll(adjustedWords)
   405→                                    }
   406→                                    completedIndices.add(index)
   407→                                    successSegments.add(index)
   408→                                }
   409→
   410→                                // 删除临时段文件
   411→                                segmentFile.delete()
   412→
   413→                                // 更新状态为完成
   414→                                segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.COMPLETED, "已完成 (${result.words.size} 词)")
   415→                                transcriptionMutex.withLock {
   416→                                    val completedCount = completedIndices.size
   417→                                    val progress = 40 + (completedCount * 50 / totalSegments)
   418→                                    val remainingTime = estimateRemainingTime(completedCount - 1, totalSegments, segmentTimes, startTime)
   419→                                    updateProgressWithStates(completedCount, totalSegments, progress,
   420→                                        "转录中 $completedCount/$totalSegments...", remainingTime, segmentStates, onProgress)
   421→                                }
   422→
   423→                                Log.d(TAG, "Segment $index transcribed: ${result.words.size} words, time=${transcriptionTime}ms")
   424→                                result
   425→                            } else {
   426→                                Log.e(TAG, "Segment $index transcription failed: ${result?.error}")
   427→                                failedSegments++
   428→
   429→                                // 更新状态为失败
   430→                                val errorBrief = if (result?.error?.contains("API Key") == true) "API Key错误"
   431→                                    else if (result?.error?.contains("quota") == true) "配额用尽"
   432→                                    else if (result?.error?.contains("network") == true) "网络错误"
   433→                                    else "转录失败"
   434→
   435→                                segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.FAILED, errorBrief)
   436→
   437→                                transcriptionMutex.withLock {
   438→                                    val completedCount = completedIndices.size
   439→                                    updateProgressWithStates(completedCount, totalSegments, 40 + ((completedCount + 1) * 50 / totalSegments),
   440→                                        "段 ${index + 1} 失败: $errorBrief", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   441→                                }
   442→
   443→                                null
   444→                            }
   445→                        }
   446→                    }
   447→                }
   448→
   449→                // 等待所有转录任务完成
   450→                try {
   451→                    transcriptionJobs.awaitAll()
   452→                } catch (e: CancellationException) {
   453→                    Log.d(TAG, "Transcription cancelled by user")
   454→                    throw e
   455→                }
   456→            }
   457→
   458→            // 按时间排序所有单词
   459→            allWords.sortBy { it.s }
   460→
   461→            // 清理临时目录
   462→            tempDir.deleteRecursively()
   463→
   464→            if (allWords.isEmpty()) {
   465→                // 所有分段都失败了 - 提供详细的失败原因
   466→                val failedDetails = segmentStates.entries
   467→                    .filter { it.value.status == SegmentStatus.FAILED }
   468→                    .map { "段 ${it.key + 1}: ${it.value.message}" }
   469→                    .joinToString("\n")
   470→
   471→                WhisperResult(
   472→                    success = false,
   473→                    error = "❌ 所有分段转录失败\n\n" +
   474→                        "总段数: $totalSegments\n" +
   475→                        "失败: $failedSegments\n" +
   476→                        "成功: 0\n\n" +
   477→                        "失败详情:\n$failedDetails\n\n" +
   478→                        "建议解决方案:\n" +
   479→                        "1. 检查网络连接是否正常\n" +
   480→                        "2. 确认 Groq API Key 已正确配置\n" +
   481→                        "3. 查看是否有配额限制\n" +
   482→                        "4. 尝试减少并发转录数量"
   483→                )
   484→            } else {
   485→                // 部分或全部成功
   486→                val sentences = buildSentences(allWords)
   487→                val fullText = sentences.joinToString(" ")
   488→                val totalTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime
   489→
   490→                updateProgressWithStates(totalSegments, totalSegments, 100, "转录完成！", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   491→
   492→                val resultMessage = if (failedSegments > 0) {
   493→                    "转录完成（部分失败）\n\n成功: ${successSegments.size}/$totalSegments\n失败: $failedSegments"
   494→                } else {
   495→                    "转录完成！\n\n成功: $totalSegments/$totalSegments 段"
   496→                }
   497→
   498→                Log.d(TAG, "Segmented transcription complete: ${allWords.size} words, ${sentences.size} sentences")
   499→                Log.d(TAG, "Total time: ${formatTime(totalTime)}, Failed: $failedSegments/$totalSegments")
   500→
   501→                WhisperResult(
   502→                    success = true,
   503→                    text = fullText,
   504→                    words = allWords,
   505→                    detectedLang = ""
   506→                )
   507→            }
   508→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   509→            tempDir.deleteRecursively()
   510→            Log.e(TAG, "Segmented transcription error", e)
   511→            WhisperResult(
   512→                success = false,
   513→                error = "分段转录失败: ${e.message}\n\n建议：检查网络连接和 API Key 配置"
   514→            )
   515→        }
   516→    }
   517→
   518→    /**
   519→     * 更新进度（带分段状态）
   520→     */
   521→    private fun updateProgressWithStates(
   522→        currentSegment: Int,
   523→        totalSegments: Int,
   524→        percent: Int,
   525→        message: String,
   526→        remainingSeconds: Long,
   527→        segmentStates: Map<Int, SegmentState>,
   528→        onProgress: (Int, Int, Int, String, Long) -> Unit
   529→    ) {
   530→        // 在消息中添加状态摘要
   531→        val completedCount = segmentStates.values.count { it.status == SegmentStatus.COMPLETED }
   532→        val failedCount = segmentStates.values.count { it.status == SegmentStatus.FAILED }
   533→        val inProgressCount = segmentStates.values.count { it.status == SegmentStatus.TRANSCRIBING }
   534→
   535→        val statusSummary = when {
   536→            failedCount > 0 -> " (成功$completedCount, 失败$failedCount)"
   537→            inProgressCount > 0 -> " (进行中$inProgressCount)"
   538→            else -> ""
   539→        }
   540→
   541→        onProgress(currentSegment, totalSegments, percent, message + statusSummary, remainingSeconds)
   542→    }
   543→
   544→    /**
   545→     * 提取音频段 - 带重试机制
   546→     */
   547→    private suspend fun extractAudioSegmentWithRetry(
   548→        inputFile: File,
   549→        outputFile: File,
   550→        startTime: Double,
   551→        duration: Double,
   552→        segmentIndex: Int
   553→    ): Boolean = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   554→        var lastError: Exception? = null
   555→
   556→        repeat(MAX_RETRIES) { attempt ->
   557→            if (attempt > 0) {
   558→                Log.d(TAG, "Retrying segment $segmentIndex extraction, attempt $attempt/$MAX_RETRIES")
   559→                delay(RETRY_DELAY_BASE_MS * attempt)
   560→            }
   561→
   562→            try {
   563→                val success = extractAudioSegment(inputFile, outputFile, startTime, duration)
   564→                if (success) return@withContext true
   565→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   566→                Log.w(TAG, "Segment $segmentIndex extraction attempt $attempt failed: ${e.message}")
   567→                lastError = e
   568→            }
   569→        }
   570→
   571→        Log.e(TAG, "Segment $segmentIndex extraction failed after $MAX_RETRIES retries", lastError)
   572→        false
   573→    }
   574→
   575→    /**
   576→     * 转录单个段 - 带重试机制，包括速率限制处理
   577→     */
   578→    private suspend fun transcribeSegmentWithRetry(
   579→        segmentFile: File,
   580→        config: AIConfig,
   581→        segmentIndex: Int,
   582→        segmentDuration: Double,
   583→        lang: String?
   584→    ): WhisperResult? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   585→        var lastResult: WhisperResult? = null
   586→
   587→        repeat(MAX_RETRIES) { attempt ->
   588→            if (attempt > 0) {
   589→                Log.d(TAG, "Retrying segment $segmentIndex transcription, attempt $attempt/$MAX_RETRIES")
   590→                delay(RETRY_DELAY_BASE_MS * attempt)
   591→            }
   592→
   593→            val result = whisperService.transcribeGroq(segmentFile, config, lang)
   594→            if (result?.success == true) {
   595→                // 成功后添加延迟，避免请求过快被限流
   596→                delay(API_REQUEST_INTERVAL_MS)
   597→                return@withContext result
   598→            }
   599→
   600→            // 检查是否是速率限制错误（429）
   601→            if (result?.error?.contains("Rate limit", ignoreCase = true) == true) {
   602→                val isRateLimit = whisperService.isRateLimitError(result.error)
   603→                if (isRateLimit.first && isRateLimit.second > 0) {
   604→                    Log.w(TAG, "Rate limit detected, waiting ${isRateLimit.second}s")
   605→                    delay(isRateLimit.second * 1000L)
   606→                    continue // 跳过重试，等待后继续
   607→                }
   608→            }
   609→
   610→            // 重试前添加延迟，避免请求过快被限流
   611→            if (attempt < MAX_RETRIES - 1) {
   612→                delay(API_REQUEST_INTERVAL_MS)
   613→            }
   614→            lastResult = result
   615→        }
   616→
   617→        Log.e(TAG, "Segment $segmentIndex transcription failed after $MAX_RETRIES retries")
   618→        lastResult
   619→    }
   620→
   621→    /**
   622→     * 估算剩余时间（秒）
   623→     */
   624→    private fun estimateRemainingTime(
   625→        currentIndex: Int,
   626→        totalSegments: Int,
   627→        segmentTimes: Map<Int, Long>,
   628→        overallStartTime: Long
   629→    ): Long {
   630→        if (currentIndex == 0 || segmentTimes.isEmpty()) {
   631→            // 还没有完成任何段，预估每段需要2分钟
   632→            return (totalSegments * 120L)
   633→        }
   634→
   635→        // 计算已完成段的平均时间
   636→        val avgTimePerSegment = segmentTimes.values.average()
   637→        val remainingSegments = totalSegments - currentIndex
   638→
   639→        return (avgTimePerSegment * remainingSegments / 1000).toLong()
   640→    }
   641→
   642→    /**
   643→     * 格式化时间显示
   644→     */
   645→    private fun formatTime(milliseconds: Long): String {
   646→        val seconds = milliseconds / 1000
   647→        return when {
   648→            seconds < 60 -> "${seconds}秒"
   649→            seconds < 3600 -> "${seconds / 60}分${seconds % 60}秒"
   650→            else -> "${seconds / 3600}小时${(seconds % 3600) / 60}分"
   651→        }
   652→    }
   653→
   654→    /**
   655→     * 计算分段策略 - 智能分段
   656→     * 1. 根据码率计算最大分段时长（确保不超过 API 文件大小限制）
   657→     * 2. 使用 FFmpeg silencedetect 找到静音点作为自然分段边界
   658→     * 3. 在静音点处分段，避免在语句中间切断
   659→     */
   660→    private fun calculateSegments(duration: Double, fileSize: Long = 0): List<AudioSegment> {
   661→        // 根据文件大小和时长计算最佳分段时长
   662→        val estimatedBitrate = if (fileSize > 0 && duration > 0) {
   663→            (fileSize * 8.0 / duration / 1000.0) // kbps
   664→        } else {
   665→            128.0
   666→        }
   667→
   668→        // 计算确保不超过 TARGET_SEGMENT_SIZE 的最大分段时长
   669→        val maxSegmentDurationForSize = if (estimatedBitrate > 0) {
   670→            (TARGET_SEGMENT_SIZE * 8.0 / estimatedBitrate / 1000.0).coerceAtMost(SEGMENT_DURATION.toDouble())
   671→        } else {
   672→            SEGMENT_DURATION.toDouble()
   673→        }
   674→
   675→        // 不低于 2 分钟
   676→        val targetSegmentDuration = maxSegmentDurationForSize.coerceAtLeast(120.0)
   677→
   678→        Log.d(TAG, "Segment strategy: targetDuration=${targetSegmentDuration.toInt()}s, bitrate=${estimatedBitrate.toInt()}kbps, totalDuration=${duration.toInt()}s")
   679→
   680→        // 如果总时长不需要分段
   681→        if (duration <= targetSegmentDuration + 30) {
   682→            return listOf(AudioSegment(0, 0.0, duration))
   683→        }
   684→
   685→        // 构建分段：在目标时长附近寻找自然断点
   686→        val segments = mutableListOf<AudioSegment>()
   687→        var currentStart = 0.0
   688→        var index = 0
   689→
   690→        while (currentStart < duration - 10) { // 剩余不足10秒就合并到上一段
   691→            val idealEnd = (currentStart + targetSegmentDuration).coerceAtMost(duration)
   692→
   693→            if (idealEnd >= duration - 10) {
   694→                // 最后一段，直接到结尾
   695→                segments.add(AudioSegment(index, currentStart, duration - currentStart))
   696→                break
   697→            }
   698→
   699→            // 实际分段时长（加 OVERLAP_DURATION 的重叠）
   700→            val segmentDuration = idealEnd - currentStart
   701→            segments.add(AudioSegment(index, currentStart, segmentDuration))
   702→
   703→            // 下一段从重叠点开始
   704→            currentStart = idealEnd - OVERLAP_DURATION
   705→            index++
   706→        }
   707→
   708→        // 如果循环结束但没有覆盖到末尾
   709→        if (segments.isEmpty()) {
   710→            segments.add(AudioSegment(0, 0.0, duration))
   711→        }
   712→
   713→        Log.d(TAG, "Created ${segments.size} segments")
   714→        return segments
   715→    }
   716→
   717→    /**
   718→     * 提取音频段 - 重新编码确保兼容性
   719→     * 修复：使用 AAC 编码而非 stream copy，解决某些格式不兼容问题
   720→     */
   721→    private suspend fun extractAudioSegment(
   722→        inputFile: File,
   723→        outputFile: File,
   724→        startTime: Double,
   725→        duration: Double
   726→    ): Boolean = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   727→        try {
   728→            // 确保输出目录存在
   729→            outputFile.parentFile?.mkdirs()
   730→
   731→            // 构建命令字符串 - 使用 AAC 编码确保兼容性
   732→            // 使用 -ss 在 -i 之前可以加速定位（input seeking）
   733→            val commandStr = buildString {
   734→                append("-hide_banner -y ")
   735→                append("-ss $startTime ")  // 定位到开始时间
   736→                append("-i \"${inputFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   737→                append("-t $duration ")  // 持续时间
   738→                append("-vn ")  // 不要视频
   739→                append("-acodec aac ")  // 使用 AAC 编码（兼容性好）
   740→                append("-b:a 32k ")  // 32kbps 比特率（够用且文件小）
   741→                append("-ac 1 ")  // 单声道
   742→                append("-ar 16000 ")  // 16kHz 采样率（Whisper 推荐）
   743→                append("\"${outputFile.absolutePath}\"")
   744→            }
   745→
   746→            Log.d(TAG, "FFmpeg command: ffmpeg $commandStr")
   747→            Log.d(TAG, "Input file: ${inputFile.absolutePath}, size: ${inputFile.length()}")
   748→            Log.d(TAG, "Output file: ${outputFile.absolutePath}")
   749→
   750→            // 使用同步执行
   751→            val session = FFmpegKit.execute(commandStr)
   752→
   753→            val returnCode = session.returnCode
   754→            val output = session.output
   755→
   756→            Log.d(TAG, "FFmpeg return code: ${returnCode?.value}")
   757→            if (output?.isNotEmpty() == true) {
   758→                Log.d(TAG, "FFmpeg output: ${output.substring(0, minOf(200, output.length))}")
   759→            }
   760→
   761→            // 检查输出文件（降低最小文件大小阈值，因为压缩后文件会更小）
   762→            val success = (returnCode?.value == 0) && outputFile.exists() && outputFile.length() > 512
   763→
   764→            Log.d(TAG, "Segment extraction result: $success, file size: ${outputFile.length()}, return code: ${returnCode?.value}")
   765→            success
   766→
   767→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   768→            Log.e(TAG, "Error extracting segment", e)
   769→            false
   770→        }
   771→    }
   772→
   773→    /**
   774→     * 压缩音频文件用于转录
   775→     * 优化参数：使用更高效的压缩设置
   776→     */
   777→    private suspend fun compressAudioForTranscription(videoFile: File): File? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   778→        try {
   779→            val tempFile = File(context.cacheDir, "compressed_${System.currentTimeMillis()}.m4a")
   780→
   781→            // 优化压缩参数：
   782→            // - 32kbps 比特率：足够清晰且文件小
   783→            // - 16kHz 采样率：Whisper 推荐的最小值
   784→            // - 单声道：减少数据量
   785→            val commandStr = buildString {
   786→                append("-hide_banner -y ")
   787→                append("-i \"${videoFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   788→                append("-vn ")  // 不要视频
   789→                append("-acodec aac ")  // 使用 AAC 编码
   790→                append("-b:a 32k ")  // 32kbps 比特率（平衡质量和大小）
   791→                append("-ac 1 ")  // 单声道
   792→                append("-ar 16000 ")  // 16kHz 采样率（Whisper 推荐）
   793→                append("-map_metadata -1 ")  // 移除元数据减小文件
   794→                append("\"${tempFile.absolutePath}\"")
   795→            }
   796→
   797→            Log.d(TAG, "Compression command: ffmpeg $commandStr")
   798→            val session = FFmpegKit.execute(commandStr)
   799→
   800→            val returnCode = session.returnCode
   801→            val success = (returnCode?.value == 0 || returnCode?.value == 1) && tempFile.exists() && tempFile.length() > 512
   802→
   803→            if (success) {
   804→                Log.d(TAG, "Audio compressed: ${tempFile.length()} bytes (from ${videoFile.length()} bytes)")
   805→                tempFile
   806→            } else {
   807→                Log.e(TAG, "Compression failed: return code ${returnCode?.value}, file exists: ${tempFile.exists()}, size: ${tempFile.length()}")
   808→                tempFile.delete()
   809→                null
   810→            }
   811→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   812→            Log.e(TAG, "Error compressing audio", e)
   813→            null
   814→        }
   815→    }
   816→
   817→    /**
   818→     * 获取视频信息
   819→     */
   820→    private fun getMediaInformation(file: File): com.arthenica.ffmpegkit.MediaInformation? {
   821→        return try {
   822→            Log.d(TAG, "Getting media information for: ${file.absolutePath}")
   823→            val session: MediaInformationSession = FFprobeKit.getMediaInformation(file.absolutePath)
   824→
   825→            Log.d(TAG, "FFprobe return code: ${session.returnCode?.value}")
   826→            Log.d(TAG, "FFprobe state: ${session.state}")
   827→
   828→            if (session.returnCode?.value == 0) {
   829→                val info = session.mediaInformation
   830→                Log.d(TAG, "MediaInfo - Duration: ${info?.getDuration()}")
   831→                info
   832→            } else {
   833→                Log.e(TAG, "FFprobe failed with code ${session.returnCode?.value}")
   834→                Log.e(TAG, "FFprobe output: ${session.output}")
   835→                null
   836→            }
   837→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   838→            Log.e(TAG, "Error getting media info", e)
   839→            Log.e(TAG, "Error stack trace: ${e.stackTraceToString()}")
   840→            null
   841→        }
   842→    }
   843→
   844→    /**
   845→     * 从单词构建句子
   846→     */
   847→    private fun buildSentences(words: List<WordTimestamp>): List<String> {
   848→        val sentences = mutableListOf<String>()
   849→        val currentSentence = mutableListOf<String>()
   850→
   851→        words.forEach { wt ->
   852→            currentSentence.add(wt.w)
   853→
   854→            // 检查句子结束
   855→            if (wt.w.trim().matches(Regex(".*[.!?。！？]$"))) {
   856→                sentences.add(currentSentence.joinToString(" "))
   857→                currentSentence.clear()
   858→            }
   859→        }
   860→
   861→        // 添加最后一个未完成的句子
   862→        if (currentSentence.isNotEmpty()) {
   863→            sentences.add(currentSentence.joinToString(" "))
   864→        }
   865→
   866→        return sentences
   867→    }
   868→}
   869→
   870→/**
   871→ * 音频分段数据类
   872→ */
   873→data class AudioSegment(
   874→    val index: Int,
   875→    val startTime: Double,  // 段开始时间（秒）
   876→    val duration: Double     // 段持续时间（秒）
   877→)
   878→

1→package com.multilanglearner.data.network
     2→
     3→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.AI_PROVIDERS
     4→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.AIConfig
     5→import kotlinx.serialization.Serializable
     6→import kotlinx.serialization.json.*
     7→import okhttp3.*
     8→import okhttp3.MediaType.Companion.toMediaType
     9→import okhttp3.RequestBody.Companion.toRequestBody
    10→import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
    11→import javax.inject.Inject
    12→import javax.inject.Singleton
    13→
    14→@Serializable
    15→data class ChatMessage(val role: String, val content: String)
    16→
    17→@Singleton
    18→class AIService @Inject constructor() {
    19→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    20→        .connectTimeout(15, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    21→        .readTimeout(60, TimeUnit.SECONDS)  // 增加读取超时
    22→        .writeTimeout(15, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    23→        .build()
    24→
    25→    private val json = Json { ignoreUnknownKeys = true }
    26→
    27→    /**
    28→     * Call AI API - ported from main.js callAI()
    29→     * Supports Claude (x-api-key + /messages) and OpenAI-compatible (/chat/completions)
    30→     */
    31→    suspend fun chat(config: AIConfig, prompt: String): String? {
    32→        if (config.apiKey.isBlank()) return null
    33→        val preset = AI_PROVIDERS.find { it.id == config.provider }
    34→        val baseUrl = config.baseUrl.ifBlank { preset?.defaultBaseUrl ?: "" }
    35→        val model = config.model.ifBlank { preset?.defaultModel ?: "" }
    36→        if (baseUrl.isBlank()) return null
    37→
    38→        val isClaude = config.provider == "claude" || model.lowercase().contains("claude")
    39→        val url = if (isClaude) "$baseUrl/messages" else "$baseUrl/chat/completions"
    40→
    41→        val bodyObj = buildJsonObject {
    42→            put("model", model)
    43→            put("max_tokens", config.maxTokens ?: 2048)  // 增加默认 token
    44→            config.temperature?.let { put("temperature", it) }
    45→            putJsonArray("messages") {
    46→                if (!isClaude) {
    47→                    addJsonObject {
    48→                        put("role", "system")
    49→                        put("content", "你是多语言学习助手。用中文回答。翻译要准确，不要音译。简洁直接。")
    50→                    }
    51→                }
    52→                addJsonObject {
    53→                    put("role", "user")
    54→                    put("content", prompt)
    55→                }
    56→            }
    57→        }
    58→
    59→        val headers = if (isClaude) {
    60→            Headers.Builder()
    61→                .add("Content-Type", "application/json")
    62→                .add("x-api-key", config.apiKey)
    63→                .add("anthropic-version", "2023-06-01")
    64→                .build()
    65→        } else {
    66→            Headers.Builder()
    67→                .add("Content-Type", "application/json")
    68→                .add("Authorization", "Bearer ${config.apiKey}")
    69→                .build()
    70→        }
    71→
    72→        val request = Request.Builder()
    73→            .url(url)
    74→            .headers(headers)
    75→            .post(bodyObj.toString().toRequestBody("application/json".toMediaType()))
    76→            .build()
    77→
    78→        return try {
    79→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
    80→            val responseBody = response.body?.string() ?: return null
    81→            val jsonResponse = json.parseToJsonElement(responseBody).jsonObject
    82→            if (isClaude) {
    83→                jsonResponse["content"]?.jsonArray?.firstOrNull()
    84→                    ?.jsonObject?.get("text")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
    85→            } else {
    86→                jsonResponse["choices"]?.jsonArray?.firstOrNull()
    87→                    ?.jsonObject?.get("message")?.jsonObject
    88→                    ?.get("content")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
    89→            }
    90→        } catch (e: Exception) {
    91→            null
    92→        }
    93→    }
    94→
    95→    /**
    96→     * 分析句子 - 增强版
    97→     * 包含：翻译、语法点、重点词汇、文化背景
    98→     */
    99→    suspend fun analyzeSentence(config: AIConfig, sentence: String, language: String = "英语"): String? {
   100→        if (config.apiKey.isBlank()) return null
   101→
   102→        val prompt = "分析以下" + language + "句子：\"" + sentence + "\"\n\n" +
   103→                "请按以下格式输出（用中文回答）：\\n\\n" +
   104→                "【📝 翻译】中文翻译\\n\\n" +
   105→                "【📚 语法】\\n" +
   106→                "1-2个关键语法点，简要说明\\n\\n" +
   107→                "【🎯 重点词汇】\\n" +
   108→                "列出3-5个重要词汇，格式：词汇 - 释义（例句）\\n\\n" +
   109→                "【💡 提示】\\n" +
   110→                "学习建议或文化背景（可选）"
   111→
   112→        return chat(config, prompt)
   113→    }
   114→
   115→    /**
   116→     * 查词释义 - 增强版
   117→     * 包含：多义项、词性、例句、同义词、反义词
   118→     */
   119→    suspend fun lookupWord(config: AIConfig, word: String, language: String = "英语", context: String = ""): WordLookupResult? {
   120→        if (config.apiKey.isBlank()) return null
   121→
   122→        val contextPart = if (context.isNotBlank()) "\n语境：$context" else ""
   123→        val prompt = "查询" + language + "单词：\"" + word + "\"" + contextPart + "\n\n" +
   124→                "请按以下格式输出（用中文回答）：\n\n" +
   125→                "【📖 词汇】" + word + "\n\n" +
   126→                "【🏷️ 词性及释义】\n" +
   127→                "1. 词性：释义\n" +
   128→                "2. 词性：释义\n\n" +
   129→                "【📝 例句】\n" +
   130→                "1. 例句\n" +
   131→                "2. 例句\n\n" +
   132→                "【🔄 同义词】同义词1, 同义词2\n\n" +
   133→                "【⚡ 反义词】反义词（如有）\n\n" +
   134→                "【💡 用法提示】\n" +
   135→                "常见用法或搭配（可选）"
   136→
   137→        val result = chat(config, prompt)
   138→        if (result != null) {
   139→            return WordLookupResult(word = word, fullAnalysis = result)
   140→        }
   141→        return null
   142→    }
   143→
   144→    /**
   145→     * 修复转录错误
   146→     * 使用 AI 检测并修复转录中的错误
   147→     */
   148→    suspend fun fixTranscription(config: AIConfig, text: String, language: String = "英语"): String? {
   149→        if (config.apiKey.isBlank()) return null
   150→
   151→        val prompt = "检测并修复以下" + language + "转录中的错误：\n\n" +
   152→                "原文：\n" + text + "\n\n" +
   153→                "请输出：\n" +
   154→                "【修复后文本】修复后的文本\n" +
   155→                "【修改说明】简要说明修改了哪些错误\n\n" +
   156→                "要求：\n" +
   157→                "1. 修复明显的拼写错误\n" +
   158→                "2. 修正语法错误\n" +
   159→                "3. 改善标点符号\n" +
   160→                "4. 保持原文意思不变"
   161→
   162→        return chat(config, prompt)
   163→    }
   164→
   165→    /**
   166→     * 批量分析词汇 - 用于批量学习
   167→     */
   168→    suspend fun analyzeVocabulary(config: AIConfig, words: List<String>, language: String = "英语"): String? {
   169→        if (config.apiKey.isBlank()) return null
   170→
   171→        val wordList = words.joinToString(", ")
   172→        val prompt = "分析以下" + language + "词汇列表：" + wordList + "\n\n" +
   173→                "请为每个词汇提供：\n" +
   174→                "1. 中文释义\n" +
   175→                "2. 常见搭配\n" +
   176→                "3. 一句例句\n\n" +
   177→                "用表格格式输出，方便查看。"
   178→
   179→        return chat(config, prompt)
   180→    }
   181→
   182→    /**
   183→     * 生成学习笔记
   184→     */
   185→    suspend fun generateStudyNotes(config: AIConfig, sentences: List<String>, language: String = "英语"): String? {
   186→        if (config.apiKey.isBlank()) return null
   187→
   188→        val text = sentences.joinToString("\n")
   189→        val prompt = "根据以下" + language + "内容生成学习笔记：\n\n" + text + "\n\n" +
   190→                "请生成结构化学习笔记，包括：\n" +
   191→                "1. 重点词汇汇总\n" +
   192→                "2. 语法要点\n" +
   193→                "3. 学习建议\n\n" +
   194→                "用 Markdown 格式输出。"
   195→
   196→        return chat(config, prompt)
   197→    }
   198→}

1→package com.multilanglearner.ui.player
     2→
     3→import android.app.Application

    61→class PlayerViewModel @Inject constructor(

    70→    private val _uiState = MutableStateFlow(PlayerUiState())
    71→    val uiState: StateFlow<PlayerUiState> = _uiState.asStateFlow()
    72→
    73→    private var tts: TextToSpeech? = null
    74→    private val json = Json { ignoreUnknownKeys = true }
    75→
    76→    init {
    77→        tts = TextToSpeech(application) { status ->
    78→            if (status == TextToSpeech.SUCCESS) {
    79→                tts?.language = Locale.US

    83→
    84→    fun loadSubtitles(videoPath: String, subtitlePath: String?) {
    85→        viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
    86→            // Try loading VTT subtitle
    87→            val vttPath = subtitlePath ?: findExistingSubtitle(videoPath)
    88→            if (vttPath != null) {
    89→                val file = File(vttPath)
    90→                if (file.exists()) {
    91→                    val content = file.readText()
    92→                    val subs = VttParser.parse(content)
    93→                    if (subs.isNotEmpty()) {
    94→                        _uiState.update { it.copy(
    95→                            subtitles = subs,
    96→                            statusText = "已加载 ${subs.size} 条字幕"
    97→                        )}
    98→                        // Load word timestamps if available
    99→                        loadWordTimestamps(vttPath)
   100→                        return@launch
   101→                    }
   102→                }
   103→            }
   104→            _uiState.update { it.copy(statusText = "无字幕文件，请在 AI 设置中配置 Groq Whisper 后重新转录") }
   105→        }
   106→    }
   107→
   108→    private fun findExistingSubtitle(videoPath: String): String? {
   109→        val base = videoPath.substringBeforeLast(".")
   110→        for (ext in listOf(".vtt", ".srt")) {
   111→            val f = File(base + ext)
   112→            if (f.exists()) return f.absolutePath
   113→        }
   114→        // Check with language suffix
   115→        val dir = File(videoPath).parentFile ?: return null
   116→        val name = File(videoPath).nameWithoutExtension
   117→        dir.listFiles()?.forEach { f ->
   118→            if (f.name.startsWith(name) && f.extension == "vtt") return f.absolutePath
   119→        }
   120→        return null
   121→    }
   122→
   123→    private fun loadWordTimestamps(vttPath: String) {
   124→        val wtsPath = vttPath.replace(Regex("\\.vtt$"), ".wordts.json")
   125→        val wtsFile = File(wtsPath)
   126→        if (wtsFile.exists()) {
   127→            try {
   128→                val timings: List<WordTimestamp> = json.decodeFromString(wtsFile.readText())
   129→                _uiState.update { it.copy(wordTimings = timings) }
   130→            } catch (_: Exception) {}
   131→        }
   132→    }
   133→
   134→    /** Called every 30ms from the player to sync subtitles */
   135→    fun updatePosition(positionMs: Long) {
   136→        _uiState.update { it.copy(currentPositionMs = positionMs) }
   137→        val subs = _uiState.value.subtitles
   138→        if (subs.isEmpty()) return
   139→
   140→        // Binary search for current cue (ported from renderer.js)
   141→        var lo = 0; var hi = subs.size - 1; var idx = -1
   142→        while (lo <= hi) {
   143→            val mid = (lo + hi) ushr 1
   144→            when {
   145→                positionMs < subs[mid].startMs -> hi = mid - 1
   146→                positionMs > subs[mid].endMs -> lo = mid + 1
   147→                else -> { idx = mid; break }
   148→            }
   149→        }
   150→        // Gap handling: find next cue within 0.5s
   151→        if (idx < 0) {
   152→            for (i in subs.indices) {
   153→                if (subs[i].startMs > positionMs) {
   154→                    idx = if (subs[i].startMs - positionMs < 500) i else if (i > 0) i - 1 else 0
   155→                    break
   156→                }
   157→            }
   158→            if (idx < 0) idx = subs.size - 1
   159→        }
   160→
   161→        if (idx != _uiState.value.currentCueIndex) {
   162→            _uiState.update { it.copy(
   163→                currentCueIndex = idx,
   164→                currentSentence = subs[idx].text,
   165→                showWordCard = false,
   166→                aiAnalysisResult = null
   167→            )}
   168→        }
   169→    }

   171→    /** Retranscribe - 使用前台服务支持后台转录 */
   172→    fun retranscribe(videoPath: String) {
   173→        val context = getApplication<Application>()
   174→        val videoName = File(videoPath).nameWithoutExtension
   175→
   176→        // 保存旧字幕状态
   177→        val oldSubtitles = _uiState.value.subtitles
   178→        val oldWordTimings = _uiState.value.wordTimings
   179→
   180→        _uiState.update { it.copy(
   181→            subtitles = emptyList(),
   182→            wordTimings = emptyList(),
   183→            currentCueIndex = -1,
   184→            isTranscribing = true,
   185→            transcribeSegment = 0,
   186→            transcribeTotalSegments = 0,
   187→            transcribeProgress = 0,
   188→            statusText = "正在准备转录..."
   189→        )}
   190→
   191→        // 启动前台服务进行转录
   192→        val intent = Intent(context, TranscriptionService::class.java).apply {
   193→            action = TranscriptionService.ACTION_START
   194→            putExtra(TranscriptionService.EXTRA_VIDEO_PATH, videoPath)
   195→            putExtra(TranscriptionService.EXTRA_VIDEO_NAME, videoName)
   196→        }
   197→        context.startForegroundService(intent)
   198→
   199→        // 保存旧字幕以备失败时恢复
   200→        _oldSubtitles = oldSubtitles
   201→        _oldWordTimings = oldWordTimings
   202→    }

   301→    /**
   302→     * 使用 AI 验证转录准确性
   303→     * 包括语言一致性检查
   304→     */
   305→    fun validateTranscriptionWithAI(detectedLang: String) {
   306→        if (_uiState.value.subtitles.isEmpty()) return
   307→
   308→        _uiState.update { it.copy(
   309→            isValidating = true,
   310→            aiValidationResult = "🔍 AI 验证中...",
   311→            showAiValidation = true
   312→        )}
   313→
   314→        viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
   315→            val uiStateValue = _uiState.value
   316→            val detectedLangLower = detectedLang.lowercase()
   317→            val detectedLangName = when (detectedLangLower) {
   318→                "zh", "chinese" -> "中文"
   319→                "en", "english" -> "英语"
   320→                "es", "spanish" -> "西班牙语"
   321→                "fr", "french" -> "法语"
   322→                "de", "german" -> "德语"
   323→                "it", "italian" -> "意大利语"
   324→                "pt", "portuguese" -> "葡萄牙语"
   325→                "ru", "russian" -> "俄语"
   326→                "ja", "japanese" -> "日语"
   327→                "ko", "korean" -> "韩语"
   328→                "ar", "arabic" -> "阿拉伯语"
   329→                "th", "thai" -> "泰语"
   330→                "vi", "vietnamese" -> "越南语"
   331→                else -> "英语"
   332→            }
   333→
   334→            // 语言一致性检查：检查检测到的语言是否与实际内容一致
   335→            val languageConsistencyCheck = checkLanguageConsistency(detectedLangLower, uiState.value.subtitles)
   336→
   337→            val subtitles = uiState.value.subtitles.take(20) // 取前20条字幕进行验证
   338→            val textToValidate = subtitles.joinToString("\n") { it.text }
   339→
   340→            val config = aiConfigStore.config.first()
   341→            val validationPrompt = """作为${detectedLangName}语言专家，请验证以下转录内容的准确性：
   342→
   343→【待验证文本】
   344→$textToValidate
   345→
   346→请从以下维度进行评估（每项 0-10 分，总分 100 分）：
   347→
   348→1. 准确性（30分）
   349→- 语音识别是否准确
   350→- 术语拼写是否正确
   351→- 专业词汇是否正确识别
   352→
   353→2. 完整性（30分）
   354→- 是否有遗漏内容
   355→- 断句是否合理
   356→- 标点符号是否正确
   357→
   358→3. 一致性（20分）
   359→- 术语翻译是否一致
   360→- 风格是否统一
   361→
   362→4. 专业性（20分）
   363→- 是否使用了恰当的表达
   364→- 专业领域术语处理是否正确
   365→
   366→$languageConsistencyCheck
   367→
   368→【评估结果】
   369→请按以下格式输出（只用数字，不要其他文字）：
   370→
   371→【总评分】
   372→【准确】X/30
   373→【完整】X/30
   374→【一致】X/20
   375→【专业】X/20
   376→
   377→【改进建议】
   378→1-3条具体建议
   379→
   380→【严重错误】
   381→列出所有发现的错误（如有）"""
   382→
   383→            val result = aiService.chat(config, validationPrompt)
   384→
   385→            _uiState.update { it.copy(
   386→                isValidating = false,
   387→                aiValidationResult = result ?: "验证失败，请检查 AI 配置",
   388→                showAiValidation = true
   389→            )}
   390→        }
   391→    }
   392→
   393→    /**
   394→     * 检查语言一致性
   395→     * 判断检测到的语言与字幕内容是否一致
   396→     */
   397→    private fun checkLanguageConsistency(detectedLang: String, subtitles: List<SubtitleCue>): String {
   398→        if (subtitles.isEmpty()) return ""
   399→        if (detectedLang.isBlank()) return "【语言未检测】"
   400→
   401→        val detectedLangName = when (detectedLang.lowercase()) {
   402→            "zh" -> "中文"
   403→            "en" -> "英语"
   404→            "es" -> "西班牙语"
   405→            else -> "英语"
   406→        }
   407→
   408→        // 检查字幕内容的语言特征
   409→        val sampleText = subtitles.take(5).joinToString(" ") { it.text }
   410→        val sampleWords = sampleText.split(Regex("\\s+")).filter { it.length > 1 }.take(10)
   411→
   412→        val hasChineseCharacters = sampleWords.any { it.contains(Regex("[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5]|[\\u4e00-\\u9fa6]|[\\u4e00-\\u9fa7]|[\\u4e00-\\u9fa8]|\\u4e00-\\u9fa9]")) }
   413→        val hasLatinChars = sampleWords.any { it.matches(Regex("^[a-zA-Z]+$")) }
   414→
   415→        val hasLatinAccents = sampleWords.any { it.contains(Regex("[áéíóúñüäëïöè]")) }
   416→
   417→        // 语言一致性判断
   418→        return when {
   419→            detectedLang == "zh" && !hasChineseCharacters && !hasLatinChars -> "【警告】检测到中文但内容主要是${if (hasLatinChars) "拉丁字母" else "未知语言字符"}"
   420→            detectedLang == "en" && hasChineseCharacters -> "【警告】检测到英语但内容包含中文"
   421→            detectedLang == "es" && !hasLatinAccents -> "【警告】检测到西班牙语但内容不含西班牙语特殊字符"
   422→            detectedLang == "fr" && hasChineseCharacters -> "【警告】检测到法语但内容包含中文"
   423→            detectedLang == "de" && hasChineseCharacters -> "【警告】检测到德语但内容包含中文"
   424→            detectedLang == "ja" && !sampleText.contains(Regex("[\\u3040-\\u309F\\u30A0-\\u30FF]")) -> "【警告】检测到日语但内容不包含日文假名"
   425→            detectedLang == "ko" && !sampleText.contains(Regex("[\\uAC00-\\uD7AF]")) -> "【警告】检测到韩语但内容不包含韩文"
   426→            else -> ""
   427→        }
   428→    }

   478→    /** Look up a word - ported from renderer.js showWordInline() */
   479→    fun lookupWord(word: String) {
   480→        _uiState.update { it.copy(showWordCard = true, wordCardData = WordCardData(word = word, translation = "查询中...")) }
   481→        speak(word)
   482→
   483→        viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
   484→            val lang = _uiState.value.currentLang
   485→            val context = _uiState.value.currentSentence
   486→            val aiConfig = aiConfigStore.config.first()
   487→
   488→            // 渐进式查词：先显示快速结果，再补充详细信息
   489→            when (lang) {
   490→                "en" -> {
   491→                    val onlineDeferred = async { runCatching { dictionaryService.lookupEnglish(word) }.getOrNull() }
   492→                    val transDeferred = async { runCatching { dictionaryService.translate(word, "en") }.getOrNull() }
   493→                    val aiDeferred = async { runCatching { aiTranslateWord(word, context, lang, aiConfig) }.getOrNull() }
   494→
   495→                    // 任何一个先返回就更新
   496→                    val trans = transDeferred.await()
   497→                    if (trans != null) {
   498→                        _uiState.update { it.copy(wordCardData = WordCardData(word = word, translation = trans)) }
   499→                    }
   500→
   501→                    val online = onlineDeferred.await()
   502→                    if (online != null) {
   503→                        _uiState.update { it.copy(wordCardData = WordCardData(
   504→                            word = word,
   505→                            phonetic = online.phonetic,
   506→                            translation = trans ?: online.translation,
   507→                            definitions = online.definitions,
   508→                            examples = online.examples
   509→                        )) }
   510→                    }
   511→
   512→                    val aiTrans = aiDeferred.await()
   513→                    val currentCard = _uiState.value.wordCardData
   514→                    _uiState.update { it.copy(wordCardData = WordCardData(
   515→                        word = word,
   516→                        phonetic = currentCard?.phonetic ?: online?.phonetic ?: "",
   517→                        translation = aiTrans ?: currentCard?.translation ?: trans ?: "未找到释义",
   518→                        definitions = currentCard?.definitions ?: online?.definitions ?: emptyList(),
   519→                        examples = currentCard?.examples ?: online?.examples ?: emptyList()
   520→                    )) }
   521→                }
   522→                "ja" -> {
   523→                    val onlineDeferred = async { runCatching { dictionaryService.lookupJapanese(word) }.getOrNull() }
   524→                    val transDeferred = async { runCatching { dictionaryService.translate(word, "ja") }.getOrNull() }
   525→                    val aiDeferred = async { runCatching { aiTranslateWord(word, context, lang, aiConfig) }.getOrNull() }
   526→
   527→                    val trans = transDeferred.await()
   528→                    if (trans != null) {
   529→                        _uiState.update { it.copy(wordCardData = WordCardData(word = word, translation = trans)) }
   530→                    }
   531→
   532→                    val online = onlineDeferred.await()
   533→                    val aiTrans = aiDeferred.await()
   534→                    _uiState.update { it.copy(wordCardData = WordCardData(
   535→                        word = word,
   536→                        phonetic = online?.phonetic ?: "",
   537→                        translation = aiTrans ?: trans ?: "未找到释义",
   538→                        definitions = online?.definitions ?: emptyList()
   539→                    )) }
   540→                }
   541→                else -> {
   542→                    val transDeferred = async { runCatching { dictionaryService.translate(word, lang) }.getOrNull() }
   543→                    val aiDeferred = async { runCatching { aiTranslateWord(word, context, lang, aiConfig) }.getOrNull() }
   544→
   545→                    val trans = transDeferred.await()
   546→                    if (trans != null) {
   547→                        _uiState.update { it.copy(wordCardData = WordCardData(word = word, translation = trans)) }
   548→                    }
   549→
   550→                    val aiTrans = aiDeferred.await()
   551→                    _uiState.update { it.copy(wordCardData = WordCardData(
   552→                        word = word,
   553→                        translation = aiTrans ?: trans ?: "未找到释义"
   554→                    )) }
   555→                }
   556→            }
   557→        }
   558→    }

   560→    private suspend fun aiTranslateWord(word: String, context: String, lang: String, config: AIConfig): String? {
   561→        val langName = LANGUAGES.find { it.code == lang }?.name ?: "英语"
   562→        val prompt = "将${langName}「${word}」翻译为中文。${if (context.isNotBlank()) "语境:\"$context\"。" else ""}只回复中文释义，多义项用/分隔，不要音译。"
   563→        return aiService.chat(config, prompt)
   564→    }

   572→        _uiState.update { it.copy(isAnalyzing = true, aiAnalysisResult = "🤖 AI分析中...") }
   573→
   574→        viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
   575→            val lang = _uiState.value.currentLang
   576→            val langName = LANGUAGES.find { it.code == lang }?.name ?: lang
   577→            val config = aiConfigStore.config.first()
   578→
   579→            // 使用增强的分析功能
   580→            val result = aiService.analyzeSentence(config, sentence, langName)
   581→            _uiState.update { it.copy(

   614→        if (sentences.isEmpty()) return
   615→        _uiState.update { it.copy(isAnalyzing = true, aiAnalysisResult = "📝 生成笔记中...") }
   616→

   630→    /** Favorite operations */

   635→    fun toggleFavorite(word: String, phonetic: String = "", translation: String = "") {
   636→        android.util.Log.d("PlayerViewModel", "toggleFavorite: word=$word, lang=${_uiState.value.currentLang}")
   637→        viewModelScope.launch {
   638→            val lang = _uiState.value.currentLang
   639→            val isFav = favoriteRepository.isFavorite(word, lang)
   640→            android.util.Log.d("PlayerViewModel", "isFavorite: $isFav")
   641→            if (isFav) {
   642→                favoriteRepository.remove(word, lang)
   643→                android.util.Log.d("PlayerViewModel", "Removed from favorites")
   644→            } else {
   645→                favoriteRepository.add(word, lang, phonetic, translation, _uiState.value.currentSentence)
   646→                android.util.Log.d("PlayerViewModel", "Added to favorites")

   651→    /** TTS */
   652→    fun speak(text: String) {
   653→        tts?.speak(text, TextToSpeech.QUEUE_FLUSH, null, "word_tts")
   654→    }
   655→
   656→    /** Dictation */
   657→    fun nextDictation() {
   658→        val nextIdx = (_uiState.value.dictationIndex + 1).coerceAtMost(_uiState.value.subtitles.size - 1)
   659→        _uiState.update { it.copy(dictationIndex = nextIdx) }
   660→    }
   661→
   662→    /** Get aligned word timings for current cue */
   663→    fun getAlignedTimings(words: List<String>): List<WordTimestamp?> {
   664→        val state = _uiState.value
   665→        val cueIdx = state.currentCueIndex
   666→        if (cueIdx < 0 || cueIdx >= state.subtitles.size || state.wordTimings.isEmpty()) {
   667→            return List(words.size) { null }
   668→        }
   669→        val cue = state.subtitles[cueIdx]
   670→        return WordAligner.alignWords(words, state.wordTimings, cue.startMs / 1000.0, cue.endMs / 1000.0)
   671→    }
   672→
   673→    /** Format remaining time for display */
   674→    private fun formatRemainingTime(seconds: Long): String {
   675→        return when {
   676→            seconds < 60 -> "${seconds}秒"
   677→            seconds < 3600 -> "${seconds / 60}分${seconds % 60}秒"
   678→            else -> "${seconds / 3600}小时${(seconds % 3600) / 60}分"
   679→        }
   680→    }
   681→
   682→    override fun onCleared() {
   683→        tts?.shutdown()
   684→        super.onCleared()
   685→    }
   686→}

    10→import java.io.File
    11→import javax.inject.Inject
    12→import javax.inject.Singleton
    13→
    14→/**
    15→ * 本地转录服务接口
    16→ *
    17→ * 支持的引擎：
    18→ * 1. **Android SpeechRecognizer** - 原生语音识别（免费，多语言）
    19→ * 2. **Vosk** - 离线语音识别（需集成模型）
    20→ * 3. **Whisper.cpp** - 优化的 Whisper 实现（需 NDK）
    21→ */
    22→@Singleton
    23→class LocalTranscriptionService @Inject constructor(
    24→    @ApplicationContext private val context: Context
    25→) {
    26→    companion object {
    27→        private const val TAG = "LocalTranscription"
    28→
    29→        // 转录引擎类型
    30→        const val ENGINE_ANDROID_SPEECH = "android_speech"
    31→        const val ENGINE_VOSK = "vosk"
    32→        const val ENGINE_WHISPER_CPP = "whisper_cpp"
    33→    }
    34→
    35→    /**
    36→     * 本地转录结果
    37→     */
    38→    data class LocalTranscriptionResult(
    39→        val success: Boolean,
    40→        val text: String = "",
    41→        val words: List<WordTimestamp> = emptyList(),
    42→        val detectedLang: String = "",
    43→        val error: String = ""
    44→    )
    45→
    46→    /**
    47→     * 使用 Android SpeechRecognizer 进行转录
    48→     *
    49→     * 优点：
    50→     * - 无需网络
    51→     * - 免费
    52→     * - 支持多种语言
    53→     * - 系统原生，性能好
    54→     *
    55→     * 限制：
    56→     * - 需要将音频分段播放转录（不支持文件直接转录）
    57→     * - 时长限制（每个分段约30秒）
    58→     * - 没有词级别时间戳
    59→     */
    60→    suspend fun transcribeWithAndroidSpeech(
    61→        audioFile: File,
    62→        lang: String? = null,
    63→        onProgress: (Int, String) -> Unit = { _, _ -> }
    64→    ): LocalTranscriptionResult = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
    65→        try {
    66→            Log.d(TAG, "Transcribing with Android SpeechRecognizer: ${audioFile.name}")
    67→
    68→            // Android SpeechRecognizer 需要 AudioTrack 播放音频并监听
    69→            // 这里返回不支持状态，需要完整实现 UI 层
    70→            // 实际实现需要：
    71→            // 1. 使用 MediaPlayer 播放音频
    72→            // 2. 使用 SpeechRecognizer 监听语音
    73→            // 3. 将识别结果收集
    74→            // 4. 重复直到音频结束
    75→
    76→            LocalTranscriptionResult(
    77→                success = false,
    78→                error = "Android SpeechRecognizer 需要播放式转录\n\n当前仅支持在线 Groq API\n\n如需本地转录，请使用小文件（<1分钟）进行测试"
    79→            )
    80→
    81→        } catch (e: Exception) {
    82→            Log.e(TAG, "Android Speech transcription error", e)
    83→            LocalTranscriptionResult(
    84→                success = false,
    85→                error = "本地转录失败: ${e.message}"
    86→            )
    87→        }
    88→    }
    89→
    90→    /**
    91→     * 检查本地转录引擎是否可用
    92→     */
    93→    fun checkEngineAvailability(engine: String): EngineAvailability {
    94→        return when (engine) {
    95→            ENGINE_ANDROID_SPEECH -> {
    96→                // Android SpeechRecognizer 总是可用（系统原生）
    97→                EngineAvailability(
    98→                    engine = engine,
    99→                    available = true,
   100→                    name = "Android 语音识别",
   101→                    description = "系统原生，无需网络，支持多种语言",
   102→                    supportedLanguages = listOf("zh-CN", "en-US", "ja-JP", "ko-KR", "ru-RU"),
   103→                    offline = true
   104→                )
   105→            }
   106→            ENGINE_VOSK -> {
   107→                // Vosk 需要集成模型
   108→                EngineAvailability(
   109→                    engine = engine,
   110→                    available = false,
   111→                    name = "Vosk",
   112→                    description = "离线语音识别，需集成模型文件",
   113→                    supportedLanguages = listOf("zh-CN", "en-US"),
   114→                    offline = true,
   115→                    requiresModel = true
   116→                )
   117→            }
   118→            ENGINE_WHISPER_CPP -> {
   119→                // Whisper.cpp 需要集成
   120→                EngineAvailability(
   121→                    engine = engine,
   122→                    available = false,
   123→                    name = "Whisper.cpp",
   124→                    description = "高性能离线转录，需 NDK 集成",
   125→                    supportedLanguages = listOf("zh-CN", "en-US", "ja-JP"),
   126→                    offline = true,
   127→                    requiresModel = true
   128→                )
   129→            }
   130→            else -> {
   131→                EngineAvailability(
   132→                    engine = "unknown",
   133→                    available = false,
   134→                    name = "未知引擎",
   135→                    description = "不支持的转录引擎"
   136→                )
   137→            }
   138→        }
   139→    }
   140→
   141→    /**
   142→     * 获取推荐的转录引擎
   143→     */
   144→    fun getRecommendedEngine(fileSize: Long, hasNetwork: Boolean): String {
   145→        return when {
   146→            hasNetwork && fileSize < 100 * 1024 * 1024 -> {
   147→                // 有网络且文件小于100MB，使用在线 API
   148→                "groq"
   149→            }
   150→            !hasNetwork -> {
   151→                // 无网络，使用 Android 原生
   152→                ENGINE_ANDROID_SPEECH
   153→            }
   154→            else -> {
   155→                // 大文件，建议分段或压缩
   156→                "groq"
   157→            }
   158→        }
   159→    }
   160→}
   161→
   162→/**
   163→ * 转录引擎可用性信息
   164→ */
   165→data class EngineAvailability(
   166→    val engine: String,
   167→    val available: Boolean,
   168→    val name: String,
   169→    val description: String = "",
   170→    val supportedLanguages: List<String> = emptyList(),
   171→    val offline: Boolean = false,
   172→    val requiresModel: Boolean = false
   173→)
   174→
